usage: merge_hierarchical_def [-help] <defFiles <...>> [-add_blockage] [-delete_blockages_over_partition_macro] [-ignore_drcfill] [-incremental_ilm_def] [-preserve_shape] [-rdl_def <string>] [-rdl_orientation {N W S E FS FW FN FE}] [-rdl_placement {x y}] [-secondary {{suffix <def file list}...}] [-skipNets] [-skip_filler] [-skip_pg] [-skip_routing <string>] [-to_layer <layer>] [-top_scope] [-topcell_orientation {N W S E FS FW FN FE}] [-topcell_placement {x y}] [-transform_file <string>] [-use_top_def_die_area] [-modules <vCell>+ | -hInsts <hInst>+]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <defFiles <...>> # Specifies DEF files to be merged

options.name: -add_blockage
options.description: indicate it's a reduced netlist and undefined instances are converted to blockages

options.name: -delete_blockages_over_partition_macro
options.description: Delete top design placement and routing blockages overlapping partition

options.name: -hInsts
options.description: Read data from def file(s) associated to the specified hInstance(s) ((hInst)+, optional)

options.name: -ignore_drcfill
options.description: Ignore the special routing with DRCFILL shape attribute

options.name: -incremental_ilm_def
options.description: Incremental flatten ILM def

options.name: -modules
options.description: Read data from def file(s) associated to the specified module(s) ((vCell)+, optional)

options.name: -preserve_shape
options.description: Preserve shapes

options.name: -rdl_def
options.description: Specifies RDL def file

options.name: -rdl_orientation
options.description: Specified orientation for RDL def

options.name: -rdl_placement
options.description: Specifies offset of RDL def

options.name: -secondary
options.description: Secondary Def file(s) to load

options.name: -skipNets
options.description: Skip merging signal nets section

options.name: -skip_filler
options.description: Skip Merging filler and decap cells

options.name: -skip_pg
options.description: Skip merging routing on pg nets

options.name: -skip_routing
options.description: Skip merging routing based on the setting

options.name: -to_layer
options.description: Skip the routing on layers from top to the specified layer if 'high_layer_routing' is specified to -skip_routing option, or from bottom to the specified layer if 'low_layer_routing' is specified to -skip_routing option ((layer), optional)

options.name: -top_scope
options.description: Merging routing on top scope nets only

options.name: -topcell_orientation
options.description: {N W S E FS FW FN FE} Specifies orientation for topcell

options.name: -topcell_placement
options.description: Specifies placement for topcell

options.name: -transform_file
options.description: Report final x and y offsets, orient in the top-level of each LEF block that got replaced by DEF, and block's origin

options.name: -use_top_def_die_area
options.description: Use Top Def Die Area
